market.newsText:
1. Sound Transit board approves 25-year light rail plan in 16-2 vote - KOMO [KOMO News]
2. Average US long-term mortgage rate climbs to 6.53%, highest level in nine months - ABC News - Breaking News, Latest News and Videos [Abcnews.com]
3. Anthropic soars to $965bn valuation, leapfrogging OpenAI - Al Jazeera [Al Jazeera English]
4. Michael Dell courted Trump early. His company has reaped rewards - CNBC [CNBC]
5. SpaceX Lowers IPO Valuation Target to at Least $1.8 Trillion - Bloomberg.com [Bloomberg]
6. 3-year-old California girl hospitalized with acute kidney failure after eating at Costa Mesa spot amid E. coli outbreak, lawsuit claims - Yahoo [New York Post]
7. Pfizer and Innovent Biologics Enter Global Strategic Collaboration to Accelerate Development of Innovative Oncology Medicines - Pfizer [Pfizer.com]
8. Caesars Entertainment, a Las Vegas Strip icon, is sold for nearly $6 billion - KOB.com [KOB]
9. Dell Stock Soars 39% as Earnings Blow Past Wall Street Expectations - Investopedia [Investopedia]
10. Stock Market Today: Oil Pares Gains as Investors Cling to Hope of Mideast Deal - WSJ [The Wall Street Journal]
market.label: MORNING SESSION

brief.headline: Crypto Bullish, Equity Tethered
brief.eli5: Bitcoin is just a digital coin that people can buy and sell online. Right now it’s barely moving, staying around $73,000. Most people think the market is calm, but that might be a lie because the big companies are still making a lot of money and people are still putting money into crypto.
brief.analyst: The market presents a paradox: low volatility in crypto, modest equity gains, and a stable risk appetite reflected in a VIX of 15.32. The 10Y Treasury is flat, suggesting a pause in monetary tightening, while DXY remains near 99. The consensus over BTC’s upside is muted, yet institutional inflows into stablecoins signal hidden demand. A careful allocation to BTC and select growth equities could capture upside while hedging with Treasury futures.
brief.quant: Short-term BTC is trading near a 20‑day SMA of $73,500, with a 30‑day ATR of $1,200. A breakout above $74,300 would confirm a bullish bias. For equities, the 50‑day EMA of the S&P 500 sits at 7,575, suggesting a slight upside bias. A 5‑minute VWAP breakout would be a quick entry point. Watch the 10Y curve for a 10‑basis‑point rise before tightening funds.
brief.chaos_line: When the market smiles, the hidden wolves are already on the hunt.

plays.details: Buy BTC at $74,000, target $78,000, stop at $72,000; catalyst: stablecoin inflows and low VIX.
Long SPX at 7,600, target 7,900, stop 7,500; catalyst: high corporate earnings and tech valuation surge.
Short SPX at 7,580, target 7,300, stop 7,650; consensus is overconfident in equity gains.

brief.trap: Retail traders are betting on a flat crypto market, ignoring the rising institutional inflows into stablecoins and the subtle bullish bias in equities.
brief.edge: The 10Y Treasury curve is almost flat; a tiny rise could trigger a sharp pullback in risk assets.

news_wires.title: Dell earnings beat fuels 39% stock jump
news_wires.impact: Dell's surprise earnings lift the broader tech sector and provide a short‑term boost to the S&P 500, while reinforcing risk‑on sentiment that could pressure the DXY lower. The rally also lifts semiconductor and data‑center exposure, nudging 10‑year Treasury yields higher as investors rotate into growth assets.

news_wires.title: US 30‑yr mortgage rate hits 6.53%
news_wires.impact: Higher long‑term mortgage rates increase borrowing costs for households, tightening credit conditions and weighing on consumer‑sensitive equities. The move pushes the 10‑year Treasury yield up, strengthens the DXY, and adds head‑room for a modest correction in risk assets.

news_wires.title: Oil eases on hopes of US‑Iran deal
news_wires.impact: Improving US‑Iran diplomatic talks lift expectations of reduced Middle‑East supply risk, pulling oil prices lower and dampening energy‑sector equities. A softer oil market benefits the broader SPX but can also weaken the DXY as dollar‑priced commodities lose appeal.
